category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Japan) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Japan Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入日本：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入日本：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Japan requirements: DENAN (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act), diamond PSE mark via a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (JET/JQA), JIS C 8712/8714 cell safety, VCCI/Giteki EMC and radio, UN 38.3 + ICAO/IMDG transport, and CSCL chemical notification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与日本要求对照：电气用品安全法（DENAN）、经登录检查机构（JET/JQA）取得的菱形PSE标志、JIS C 8712/8714电芯安全、VCCI/技适EMC及无线电、UN 38.3 + ICAO/IMDG运输，以及CSCL化学物质申报。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與日本要求對照：電氣用品安全法（DENAN）、經登錄檢查機構（JET/JQA）取得的菱形PSE標誌、JIS C 8712/8714電芯安全、VCCI/技適EMC及無線電、UN 38.3 + ICAO/IMDG運輸，以及CSCL化學物質申報。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must obtain JIS C 8712/8714 testing, the diamond PSE mark for lithium-ion secondary batteries via a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET/JQA) under the DENAN Act, VCCI/Giteki conformity where electronics or radio are present, and UN 38.3 transport reports — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须取得JIS C 8712/8714检测报告、依据电气用品安全法（DENAN）经登录检查机构（如JET/JQA）取得锂离子二次电池的菱形PSE标志、在含电子或无线电时取得VCCI/技适符合性，以及UN 38.3运输报告——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須取得JIS C 8712/8714檢測報告、依據電氣用品安全法（DENAN）經登錄檢查機構（如JET/JQA）取得鋰離子二次電池的菱形PSE標誌、在含電子或無線電時取得VCCI/技適符合性，以及UN 38.3運輸報告——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, registered conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from meti.go.jp, jisc.go.jp, jet.or.jp, vcci.jp, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does China's GB 31241 meet Japan's requirements for lithium battery safety?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241是否满足日本锂电池安全要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241是否滿足日本鋰電池安全要求？

a.en: No. Japan requires lithium-ion secondary batteries (within the rated energy-density scope) to comply with the technical standards under the DENAN Act (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act), referencing JIS C 8712 and JIS C 8714. As Specified Electrical Appliances, they require third-party conformity assessment by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body (e.g., JET or JQA) and the diamond PSE mark. A GB 31241 test report alone is not sufficient for the Japanese market, and a Japan-based notifying business operator (届出事業者) must be registered with METI.
a.zh: 不。日本要求锂离子二次电池（在额定能量密度范围内）符合电气用品安全法（DENAN）下的技术基准，参照JIS C 8712及JIS C 8714。作为特定电气用品，须由登录检查机构（如JET或JQA）进行第三方合格评定并取得菱形PSE标志。仅凭GB 31241测试报告不足以进入日本市场，还须由在日本的届出事业者向经济产业省（METI）完成申报登记。
a.zht: 不。日本要求鋰離子二次電池（在額定能量密度範圍內）符合電氣用品安全法（DENAN）下的技術基準，參照JIS C 8712及JIS C 8714。作為特定電氣用品，須由登錄檢查機構（如JET或JQA）進行第三方合格評定並取得菱形PSE標誌。僅憑GB 31241測試報告不足以進入日本市場，還須由在日本的届出事業者向經濟產業省（METI）完成申報登記。

q.en: What does Japan's DENAN Act require from lithium battery exporters?
q.zh: 日本电气用品安全法（DENAN）对锂电池出口商有哪些要求？
q.zht: 日本電氣用品安全法（DENAN）對鋰電池出口商有哪些要求？

a.en: Under the DENAN Act administered by METI, lithium-ion secondary batteries are listed as Specified Electrical Appliances in the Appended Table, requiring conformity to the technical standards (Ministerial Ordinance), third-party certification by a Registered Conformity Assessment Body, affixing of the diamond PSE mark, business notification to METI, and retention of conformity records. Power banks incorporating electronics may additionally fall under VCCI EMC self-regulation, and wireless variants require MIC Giteki (技適) certification.
a.zh: 在经济产业省（METI）主管的电气用品安全法（DENAN）下，锂离子二次电池列入附表的特定电气用品，须符合技术基准（省令）、由登录检查机构进行第三方认证、粘贴菱形PSE标志、向METI进行事业申报，并保存符合性记录。集成电子元件的移动电源还可能适用VCCI EMC自律规则，含无线功能的型号须取得总务省（MIC）技适（技術基準適合）认证。
a.zht: 在經濟產業省（METI）主管的電氣用品安全法（DENAN）下，鋰離子二次電池列入附表的特定電氣用品，須符合技術基準（省令）、由登錄檢查機構進行第三方認證、粘貼菱形PSE標誌、向METI進行事業申報，並保存符合性記錄。整合電子元件的行動電源還可能適用VCCI EMC自律規則，含無線功能的型號須取得總務省（MIC）技適（技術基準適合）認證。
